title: Build AdaUI foundation primitives required by a dashboard-style app
summary: Close the AdaUI gaps that block the shell and interactive surfaces: focus, text input, tabs, and stable scrolling.
scope: Implement focus routing needed for keyboard-first interactions
Implement a reusable text input foundation for chat and forms
Build app-level tab controls on AdaUI
Fix scroll behavior required for long feeds and transcripts
deliverables: text input primitive with insert/delete behavior
focus model usable by chat and settings forms
tests for input and scroll regressions
acceptance_criteria: Tabs can switch content without layout corruption
Text input supports insert and backspace on macOS and iOS
Long scrollable lists remain stable while content updates
New generic primitives are covered by focused tests
